items.title: Kid Rock Rides Apache Helicopter with Pete Hegseth in Video to Open New Tour

items.title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Nato seeks clarification
items.dek: German Defence Minister Boris Pistorius said the US decision to withdraw 5,000 troops was to be expected.
items.body: German Defence Minister Boris Pistorius said the US decision to withdraw 5,000 troops was to be expected.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: California to begin ticketing driverless cars that violate traffic laws
items.dek: Under the new rules, police will be able to issue tickets directly to the car's manufacturer when an autonomous vehicle breaks a traffic law.
items.body: Under the new rules, police will be able to issue tickets directly to the car's manufacturer when an autonomous vehicle breaks a traffic law.
items.author: IriLine Desk
